events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a standard work execution on a manufacturing/assembly floor where a verification step was skipped under takt pressure (TRD - Takt Related Defect). The work is roughed in but not closed out. It's roughly 70% complete until defects are corrected.

Key points:
- Skipped verification step under takt pressure
- Work is rough-complete stage
- ~70% complete until defects corrected
- This is a non-compliance - verification step was skipped
- Component condition: installed-defective (installed but defective because verification was skipped)

Decision: fail (non-compliant - skipped verification step)
Risk: high (skipped quality gate under takt pressure)
Work stage: rough-complete
Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant
Percent complete: 70
Value: 0 (not asked for a numeric reading)
Confidence: 0.85
Findings: skipped verification step, work not verified
Actions: perform verification step, hold work until verified
References: site standard work, TWI
